# Pkce.DeriveCodeChallenge method

Derives the `S256``code_challenge` from a `code_verifier`: `BASE64URL(SHA-256(code_verifier))` (R-23.5-b).

```csharp
public static string DeriveCodeChallenge(string codeVerifier)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| codeVerifier | A valid PKCE `code_verifier`. |

## Return Value

The derived challenge.

| exception | condition |
| --- | --- |
| ArgumentException | When *codeVerifier* is not a valid PKCE verifier. |
